title: The Blue Mountains Mystery
writer: Raymond Longford, Lottie Lyell, Harrison Owen
actors: Marjorie Osborne, John Faulkner, Vivian Edwards
plot: Girl, in love with newspaper man, who is disapproved by father, returns home after several years of travel to find father, a widower, married, much to her displeasure. They are invited to an entertainment in hotel on top of mounta...
